method.selected: Score-bucket event study with bootstrap confidence bands, Spearman rank correlation, and 252-trading-day rolling stability checks
method.reason: The regime model is ordinal and threshold-based; this keeps the analysis interpretable and avoids overfitting a small, overlapping forward-return sample.
method.primaryTarget: SPY forward return, realized volatility, and max drawdown over 5/10/20/60 trading days
